problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuroinflammation. Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
